mapper.sql: id, goal_id, user_id, title, description, completed, start_date, end_date, daily_start_time, daily_end_time, is_anytime, duration_minutes, color, tags, updated_by, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tasks ( id, goal_id, user_id, title, description, completed, start_date, end_date, daily_start_time, daily_end_time, is_anytime, duration_minutes, color, tags, updated_by ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{goalId}, #{userId}, #{title}, #{description}, #{completed}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{dailyStartTime}, #{dailyEndTime}, #{anytime}, #{durationMinutes}, #{color}, #{tags, typeHandler=com.heang.koriaibackend.common.mybatis.StringListTypeHandler, jdbcType=ARRAY}, #{updatedBy} )
mapper.select: SELECT FROM tasks WHERE goal_id = #{goalId} ORDER BY start_date NULLS LAST, created_at
mapper.update: UPDATE tasks SET title = #{title}, description = #{description}, completed = #{completed}, start_date = #{startDate}, end_date = #{endDate}, daily_start_time = #{dailyStartTime}, daily_end_time = #{dailyEndTime}, is_anytime = #{anytime}, duration_minutes = #{durationMinutes}, color = #{color}, tags = #{tags, typeHandler=com.heang.koriaibackend.common.mybatis.StringListTypeHandler, jdbcType=ARRAY}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tasks SET completed = #{completed}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: WITH computed AS ( SELECT t.id AS task_id, t.user_id AS user_id, COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(t.title), ''), LEFT(t.description, 80), 'Task') AS title, t.goal_id AS goal_id, u.reminder_offset_minutes AS offset_min, ( (date(t.start_date AT TIME ZONE COALESCE(u.timezone, 'UTC')) + t.daily_start_time) AT TIME ZONE COALESCE(u.timezone, 'UTC') ) AS start_instant FROM tasks t JOIN users u ON u.id = t.user_id WHERE t.completed = false AND COALESCE(t.is_anytime, false) = false AND t.daily_start_time IS NOT NULL AND t.reminder_sent_at IS NULL ) SELECT task_id, user_id, title, goal_id FROM computed WHERE start_instant > now() AND (start_instant - make_interval(mins => COALESCE(offset_min, 30))) <= now()
mapper.update: UPDATE tasks SET reminder_sent_at = now() WHERE id = #{id}
